items.name: QR Reconstruction
items.summary: A fragmented QR puzzle where careful visual reasoning beat automated reconstruction tools and LLM prompting.
items.coverAlt: BroncoCTF horse mascot carrying the BroncoCTF flag
items.lesson: Recognized that the QR fragments preserved their relative positions, then rebuilt the code manually after online tools, LLM prompting, and automated reconstruction attempts failed.

items.name: HVL
items.summary: Emoji in the source, readable flag in the browser: a custom-font challenge solved through CMAP glyph analysis.
items.lesson: Solved a custom-font rendering trick by extracting the challenge font, reading its CMAP table, and mapping emoji code points to readable glyph names.

items.name: Admin Fury
items.summary: An OSINT trail from a single event photo to the exact Comic Frontier edition, booth, and row range.
items.lesson: Tracked the event from visual clues, confirmed Comifuro 22 from wristband/context, then mapped the RGB Team booth to derive the nearest row range.
